overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night in a video game. The scene transitions from a covered plaza with bright yellow neon chandeliers to open streets with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights, then along busy roads with futuristic architecture and holographic billboards, finally entering another covered walkway with large advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza entrance with neon chandeliers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza with reflective wet floors

entered.detail: large glowing yellow chandelier structures hanging from the ceiling
large illuminated screen displaying cityscape imagery
massive structural columns supporting the overhead cover
shiny wet tiled surface reflecting the yellow neon lights
transparent glass panels showing interior spaces

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian plaza with distinctive yellow neon chandeliers hanging overhead. The wet tiled floor reflects the warm yellow light, and concrete pillars line the right side. The camera moves forward through this sheltered space toward the open street visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: exits covered walkway into open rainy intersection
futuristic black sedan drives past from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing the futuristic architecture and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: tall digital display showing a woman's face with blue neon accents
tall glass and steel building with illuminated windows rising in the background
bold yellow striped lines marking the pedestrian crossing area
illuminated signal posts at the intersection corners

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered plaza, the scene opens into a vast rainy intersection surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers. A massive holographic billboard displays on the right while the camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk. A futuristic black sedan drives past from the right as rain falls heavily on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with elevated highway structure

events.description: turns left to follow the sidewalk alongside moving traffic
approaches next intersection with traffic signals and overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person holding black umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with yellow accent lighting running along its length
dark modern building with geometric architectural details
tall poles with bright white illumination cutting through the rain

segments.scene_description: Walking along the city sidewalk, the camera passes under an elevated highway structure with distinctive yellow lighting. The street is lined with futuristic buildings and illuminated by bright streetlights cutting through the rain. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk in the opposite direction as vehicles pass by on the wet road.

events.description: enters covered walkway with large wall-mounted COLA advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway, passing other pedestrians and observing the large wall advertisements

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement displaying COLA branding with white text
elongated covered pedestrian path with overhead protection from rain
structural columns wrapped with digital signage displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a covered transit walkway protected from the rain. Large COLA brand advertisements dominate the right wall, illuminated brightly against the dark surroundings. The camera continues forward through this sheltered corridor, passing other pedestrians while the wet pavement continues to reflect the ambient neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered neon plaza through a rain-drenched cyberpunk intersection and finally into a covered transit corridor. It begins beneath distinctive yellow neon chandeliers in a covered pedestrian plaza, moving forward across wet tiled floors toward the open city. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a vast rainy intersection where a massive holographic billboard looms over a yellow-striped crosswalk and a futuristic black sedan glides past on the wet asphalt. The movement then continues along a city sidewalk under the yellow glow of an elevated highway, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and bright streetlights cutting through the heavy rain. Finally, the camera shifts back into a sheltered transit walkway, passing large, brightly illuminated COLA advertisements that reflect off the damp pavement.
